messages.author: Delta3
messages.text: I have discovered what I believe to be a bug in the room server. Using the same Companion Bluetooth device, if I log into the room server I can see what others have said and what I sent. However if I log into the same Companion device after that with my iPad, I can’t see those messages. But I can see any messages I’ve sent with the iPad and any messages I’ve read with the iPad. So, if the iPad reads sent messages first, they are not viewable on my iPhone. Outside message entered can only be seen with my iPhone. Keep in mind both pallets devices are connecting to the same Bluetooth campion device to check the messages. Was happening on firmware version 1.10 and 1.11 on all devices used in the test.
messages.content_html: I have discovered what I believe to be a bug in the room server. Using the same Companion Bluetooth device, if I log into the room server I can see what others have said and what I sent. However if I log into the same Companion device after that with my iPad, I can’t see those messages. But I can see any messages I’ve sent with the iPad and any messages I’ve read with the iPad. So, if the iPad reads sent messages first, they are not viewable on my iPhone. Outside message entered can only be seen with my iPhone. Keep in mind both pallets devices are connecting to the same Bluetooth campion device to check the messages. Was happening on firmware version 1.10 and 1.11 on all devices used in the test.

messages.author: 🦦 Hilton Travis SMBI
messages.text: Once you've downloaded the unread messages they are no longer unread... So not being unread, they are no longer downloaded. And the messages live in the app, not on the Companion.
messages.content_html: Once you've downloaded the unread messages they are no longer unread... So not being unread, they are no longer downloaded. And the messages live in the app, not on the Companion.
